## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SentinelOne and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, CVE vulnerability database progress, and performance updates.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [CVE database frontend is ready for testing, but backend integration is pending due to access token issues](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [800 CVE articles have been generated and are ready for deployment once the system is set up](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [5 new content pieces will be ready by Friday, with 5 more assignments for next week](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [LLM referrals, particularly from ChatGPT, remain steady for SentinelOne, with cybersecurity 101 content performing well](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)

## Topics

### CVE Vulnerability Database Progress

  - [Frontend is ready for testing, needs design refinement](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Backend integration pending due to lack of management token for ContentStack](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Marcus awaiting GitHub access for website work](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [800 CVE articles generated and loaded in Atlas platform, ready for push](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [New feature request: Add related CVEs/technology section to individual CVE pages](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Schema implementation for SEO structure data on CVE hub and details pages forthcoming](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)

### Content Updates and Review Process

  - [5 new content pieces ready by Friday, 5 more assignments for next week](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [9 articles ready to go live](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Content review process ongoing, with specific PMM input for cloud security and threat intelligence](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Adjustments to content structure: adding product offering specifications and more relevant conclusions](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [3 published blogs received \~150 sessions across all search channels](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [Organic search performance varies: AI threat landscape blogs ranking on page 1, others on page 2](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [LLM referrals remain steady, unlike some competitors who saw drops](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [ChatGPT referrals strong, particularly for cybersecurity 101 content](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Perplexity referrals growing steadily](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)

### UI and Feature Updates

  - [New related CVEs/technology section to be added to individual CVE pages](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Logic to be implemented: only show related section if 3+ entries available](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)

## Next Steps

  - [George to review UI change request for related CVEs section](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [Marcus to implement logic for showing related CVEs only when 3+ entries are available](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
  - [Aida to provide specific release timeline dates once Marcus receives the ContentStack token](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Katya to refine content pipeline based on recent feedback and specifications](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Team to continue reviewing and approving content assignments in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/Vs3ug9smRz6WTBtNsJqXxavu1r4ndSzu?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
